questionHtml:
An electron of initial energy E tunnels through a potential barrier. What is the energy of the electron after tunnelling?

A.     greater than E

B.     E

C.     less than E

D.     zero

meta.title: An electron of initial energy E tunnels through a potential barrier. What is the energy of the electron after tunnelling? A. greater than E B. E C. less than E D. zero
